title: TechTalk Series - 2025
content:
## TechTalk Series - 2025
Join McCarthy Tétrault’s National Technology Industry Group for an informative five-part webinar series where expert speakers will provide key insights on best practices and emerging issues in the tech world. Please register for your topics of interest from the sessions below:
Wednesday, November 26, 2025
Trends in AI Litigation
- Michael Feder, K.C. , Partner, Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group, McCarthy Tétrault
- Connor Bildfell , Partner, Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group, McCarthy Tétrault
Note: All instructions and information on how to access the webinars will be forwarded a few days before the event.
This series qualifies for up to 5 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This series contains up to 5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
If you have questions about this series, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
